case_title: FIDELTY CREDITOR SERVICE INC. VS. DAVID M. COLLIER et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED BY THE COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-24-2013 AT 10:30 AM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-18-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST DOUGLAS DIX LLOYD, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-18-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-05-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-18-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-18-2013 CONTINUED TO AUG-06-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 AGAINST LLOYD DOUGLAS DIX, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-06-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-23-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-06-2013 CONTINUED TO SEP-24-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). ***NOTE: IF THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE, ANSWER OR DEFAULT, AND NO PAYMENT OF OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS BY THE SEP-24-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, THE COURT INTENDS TO DISMISS THIS MATTER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-24-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-06-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. The court orders the case dismissed. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2013 Continued To Sep-24-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $500.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to SEP-24-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
